why_founder_only: Reading live Apple state requires founder-held App Store Connect credentials. No agent may infer it from a local ledger.

capture.1: current app version and build number

capture.4: any rejection, Resolution Center, export-compliance, privacy, agreement, or metadata message

agent_commitment: On receipt of the observation, the agent maps it mechanically to the HELM result, updates the two Apple gates, recomputes champion completion from validators, and either promotes to SHIPPED or opens the precise remediation. No inference, no ledger substitution.
